title: HR and Admin Executive
description:
Job Description - Human Resource:

· Full-spectrum of HR cum administrations, including Recruitment, Compensations and Benefits, Performance appraisal, Payroll Processing, implementation of policies, staffs' discipline/disputes, and other HR-related functions

· Assist in work pass application and using of WPOL, EPOL, and MyMOM Portal

· Liaise with agent to get the worker details who will be on board

· Co-coordinating for appointments with MOM on work permit card and medical checkup for the same

· Maintain, update and ensure accuracy of all HR records, systems, user guides, internal policies and personnel file

· Manage the complete on-boarding and off-boarding process for all Singaporeans and foreign employees including the administrative work (eg; employment contract, policies, medical claims, insurance matters, and monthly headcount reports, etc.)

· Responsible for payroll computation on the respective department

· Prepare monthly payroll report and summary report for Finance

· Support day-to-day activities of our HR & Admin department, include processing employee data, learning & development, assisting in the hiring process, scholarship and sponsorship, internship program, orientation and make sure all HR operations run smoothly

· Administration of mandatory training including but not limited to monitoring the validity of the training certificate(s), training registration, etc

· Coordinate with MOM listed training centers to book training for new workers, existing workers whenever its necessary

· Specialize in end-to-end recruitment functions which include job posting, screening, and interviewing

· Monitor monthly staff medical / dental claims

· Handle all other HR matters and administration tasks as assigned by the manager


Job Description - Administration:

· Support Manager in Company Administration matters

· Manage and maintain contact list changes

· Arrange accommodation and transportation for our company business partners as well as our staff

· Provide administrative support such as scanning, filling, compiling documents, invoice, etc

· Assist in administration of company insurances, medical claims etc. through insurance broker

· Assist in organizing Company functions and staff welfare activities

· General office administration including but not limited to answering incoming calls, distribute incoming letters, update phone and email listing etc

· Order office supplies/pantries and research new deals and suppliers list



Requirements:

· Candidate must possess at least Diploma / Degree in Human Resource Management or equivalent or Business Administration or related discipline

· Minimum 2 years of experience in Human Resources or related

· Good knowledge of Employment Act & Singapore regulations

· Able to work in a fast-paced environment

· Independent team player with the ability to multi-task

· Attention to details and good administrative skills

· Good communication skills


IMPORTANT

You may use the link to submit your job application.

https://sy.seikowall-idd.com/TH6/public/hr/recruitment/eform_v1.xhtml?comp=SWPL

postedCompany.description:
SEIKO WALL PTE LTD


SEIKO has been an established provider of quality building façade components and/ or products to the construction industry in Singapore and internationally.


For more than 40 years, our extensive capabilities shaped the facades of buildings to be well – designed aesthetically while also compiling to legal and environmental factors.
postedCompany.name: SEIKO WALL PTE. LTD.
